title: DMLT Jobs 2026 – Project Nurse, Project Technical Support
shortInfo: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for 4 vacancies of Project Nurse, Project Technical Support posts. Candidates can apply through email mode from 25.05.2026 to 04.06.2026 by submitting their application form along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 04 Project Nurse, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for 4 vacancies of Project Nurse, Project Technical Support posts. Candidates can apply through email mode from 25.05.2026 to 04.06.2026 by submitting their application form along with required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

age_limit.maximum_age: Max: 35 years for Project Nurse-II, Max: 30 years for Project Technical Support - I
age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years for Project Nurse-II, Max: 30 years for Project Technical Support - I
age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Rishikesh Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course., 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT / ITI or equivalent). Or Three years Graduate degree
qualification.details: Project Nurse-II: Three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course. Project Technical Support - I: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT / ITI or equivalent) + two Years experience in relevant subject / field. Or Three years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + one year experience in relevant subject.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026 is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for Project Nurse-II and Project Technical Support - I posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies. One vacancy is for the Project Nurse-II post, and three vacancies are for the Project Technical Support - I post.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for Project Nurse-II?
faq.answer: For the Project Nurse-II position, candidates must have completed a three-year General Nursing & Midwife (GNM) Course.

faq.question: What are the eligibility criteria for Project Technical Support - I?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed 10th grade along with a Diploma (MLT/DMLT / ITI or equivalent) and two years of relevant experience, or a three-year Graduate degree in a relevant field with one year of experience.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years for Project Nurse-II and 30 years for Project Technical Support - I.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,800 to Rs. 22,000 per month, depending on the post and including House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Examination followed by an Interview.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for AIIMS Rishikesh Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply by sending their complete application along with necessary documents via email.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification and application links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.
